scores.correctness_notes: Covers all supported bases, architectures, multi-base syntax in both shorthand and extended forms. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: Includes riscv64 in supported architectures list (not in gold standard). Also states 'build-for must be a single target' which may not be precisely accurate, and adds 'charmcraft 3.1+' version claim not in gold standard. Minor additions not verified against source.
